22:32 â December 15, 2022
Update to the International Transfers Part
The International Transfersâ FX spread revenue credit and statement date was changed from the 1st business day of the following month to the 15th. We updated the relevant section in the Part to reflect the change. We also made other minor changes to the Part.
Electronic Transactions Volume
International Transfers Part
Section 1.5, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
We added a link to the International Transfers training video page.
Section 1.6, International Transfers Document Library
We added the Treasury Reports User Guide, Form 6158, to the document library. Users access the International Transfers FX spread revenue statement via Treasury Reports.
Section 2, Terminology
We added Treasury Reports to the definitions.
Section 4.1, Settlement of International Transfers
We updated the FX spread revenue credit and statement date.
